title: More Nonsense Limerick 13
content:
There was an old man of Dee-side
    Whose hat was exceedingly wide,
    But he said, "Do not fail, 
    If it happen to hail,
    To come under my hat at Dee-side!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 13"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
